topic: Historical Gemini CLI SQLcl MCP tooling and Antigravity CLI restoration plan

key_findings.gemini_cli_status: Google announced Gemini CLI consumer/free tiers stop serving requests on 2026-06-18 and transition to Antigravity CLI
key_findings.antigravity_mcp_config: Antigravity 2.0, IDE, and CLI share ~/.gemini/config/mcp_config.json for MCP servers
key_findings.local_agy_version: agy 1.0.8 is installed locally and supports plugin import/install/validate/list
key_findings.historical_behavior: Original installer configured SQLcl, sequential-thinking, and Context7 MCP servers in ~/.gemini/settings.json
key_findings.current_repo_gap: Current install sqlcl still contains Gemini-specific MCP code targeting ~/.gemini/settings.json, but no Antigravity target
key_findings.recommendation: Replace Gemini-specific helpers with clean Antigravity MCP config helpers; add explicit SQLcl MCP and optional MCP Toolbox configuration/install commands; do not migrate legacy Gemini config
key_findings.mcp_toolbox_revision: Google MCP Toolbox now has current Oracle prebuilt support, so an optional manage.py install mcp-toolbox command is justified outside install all

commits_analyzed: 094da5a feat: Refactor Oracle CLI into modular command groups
03f95ef fix: include missing lib directory and updated agents (#13)
da56791 refactor(devops): manage.py accelerator-style rewrite + coffee CLI rename
adb7aba test: simplify ADK/test suite to public-behavior assertions; remove legacy sqlcl migration
1c75677 Refactor SQLcl installation and verification process; improve wallet validation and connection testing
